title: Learning Assistants Spring 2026 | NYU Shanghai
description: Jointly established by New York University and East China Normal University, NYU Shanghai is the third degree-granting campus in NYU global network, joining NYU Abu Dhabi and NYU New York City.
text:
Learning Assistants Spring 2026
Sean WangScience Lead LABIOL-SHU 21 Foundations of Biology I, CHEM-SHU 226 Organic Chemistry IIHi, I'm Sean, a senior biology major! This year, I'll be the LA for both FoB1 and Organic Chemistry 2, two of my favorite classes! Yay! I currently do cell biology research with Professor Li, but I also have some experience in computational biology in Professor Sanjana's lab. And finally, a fun fact about me is that I used to be a LSAT tutor for 7Sage! Please feel free to stop by in the ARC and say hi!
